items.titolo: Researchers say they can spy on your browsing by measuring SSD activity through a browser API — claim FROST attack requires no permissions or user interaction to identify which apps and websites you're using
items.descrizione: FROST exploits the Origin Private File System (OPFS), a browser API that lets websites create and store files on a user's local disk.

items.titolo: Why I ditched Copilot for Claude in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint - and how you can, too
items.descrizione: Need AI help in Microsoft 365, but don't love Copilot? Claude AI can help you create, edit, and analyze documents. Here's how.

items.titolo: How to force Google AI Overviews to prioritize your favorite news sources
items.descrizione: Google's Preferred Sources feature is now available in AI Overviews and AI Mode, so you can add your favorite sites to your AI-powered searches.

items.titolo: Anthropic launches Opus 4.8, with honesty as its killer feature
items.descrizione: Anthropic's latest Claude model isn't just faster or smarter. Opus 4.8 is being pitched as more honest, more careful, and better suited to complex coding projects.
